era_context: Early Bronze Age III. Egypt's Old Kingdom (Dynasty VI) in its final phases. Mesopotamian city-states operate independently. Indus Valley Civilization in its mature phase. Bronze Age societies across Eurasia are developing increasingly complex trade networks and administrative systems.
geographic_coverage_gaps: All regions except Egypt and Indus Valley
disconfirming_evidence: No events are attested for this year.
historiographic_note: 2996 BCE is undocumented in surviving sources. No year-by-year historical reconstruction is possible for this period.
